query:
-- How many manual named_unverified contacts have emails vs no email?
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 'has_email' ELSE 'no_email' END as emailStatus,
  CASE WHEN linkedinUrl IS NOT NULL AND linkedinUrl != '' THEN 'has_linkedin' ELSE 'no_linkedin' END as linkedinStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual' AND contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
GROUP BY emailStatus, linkedinStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;
